request_text: Fix all open issues with PR #1850 (Tooling stability: guard coherence + execution-context unification + CI remediation) and make it merge worthy: resolve the four validated P1 findings (protected-branch guard capability bypass, mission handle canonicalization stopping early, sync daemon reaper interpreter-only scope, CI next path filter missing src/runtime/next) plus the two new blockers (StatusReadPathNotFound error-contract leak, tracked legacy-warning-shown marker files), and add the required regression tests.
